afterSnapshot.name: ROUTE_LOW_VIS_CLOUD_PCT
afterSnapshot.description: Cloud cover (%) at or above which a leg is flagged as low visibility (fog/overcast proxy).

context.userMessage: Approved. Go ahead with the plan.

rationale: Near-total overcast is a proxy for fog/poor visibility absent a dedicated visibility field.
implementation: 95% flags only near-complete overcast to avoid false positives.
